figures.caption: Figure 1: Overall framework of the proposed Adaptive Cross-Modal Gating (ACMG) network, (A) and (B) illustrate the details of Multi-Head Attention and ACMG modules, respectively.

Figure 2: Visualization of gating weights in the ACMG module. The top curves and bottom heatmap illustrate the adaptive feature selection across acoustic and textual modalities, respectively. The blue shaded region denotes the low-energy region in the acoustic signal, while the red boxes highlight negative words in the transcript.
Table 1: Performance comparison on PDCD2025 using official 5-fold cross-validation.
